labels.name: agent:claimed:claude-code
labels.description: Issue currently claimed by Claude Code

labels.name: agent:claimed:supervisor
labels.description: Issue claimed by the supervisor loop (dedup lock)

labels.name: status:intake
labels.description: Created; not yet triaged or readiness-checked

labels.name: status:in_progress
labels.description: Leased; agent or human actively executing

labels.name: status:in_review
labels.description: Linked PR or review artifact exists

labels.name: status:done
labels.description: Acceptance criteria and required verification passed

labels.name: status:abandoned
labels.description: Retired alias for status:cancelled — do not use on new issues

labels.name: area:auth
labels.description: Changes touch authentication or JWT handling

labels.name: risk:high
labels.description: High-risk change: workflows, packages, wrangler config, or migrations

labels.name: supervisor:no-template
labels.description: No template matched — Red tier, requires CODEOWNER to author template or handle manually
